headers.from: security@paypal-alert.com To: victim@gmail.com Subject: Urgent: Verify your PayPal Account  Dear Customer,  Your PayPal account has been temporarily suspended due to unusual activity.  To restore access please verify your account immediately.  Click the secure link below:  http://verify-paypal-account.top/login  Failure to verify within 24 hours will result in permanent suspension.  PayPal Security Team
